2.0: A heavy, suffocating air filled the dimly lit room.
2.2:
The man lay weakly on the bed,
the fabric covering him trembling with his 
shallow breaths, as if it might stop moving 
at any moment.
2.3:
Even as a naive boy,
I instinctively sensed from that frail body 
and pale face that this was what it looked like 
when a life was about to burn out.
2.4: "You’ll probably have a tough time after this..."
2.5:
His voice was hoarse and weak, each word sounding 
like it drained what little life he had left,
painfully forced out of his throat.
2.6:
"I know this isn’t something a father should say...  \w[30]
but I still hope you can promise me—"
2.8:
I stood there in a daze, 
unable to process this sudden final message, 
my mind completely blank.
2.9:
Ah... these were important words, 
and yet I couldn’t focus at all
I could only stare blankly at my father's face 
as the light slowly left it.
2.10:
"…Please take care of her,  \w[30]
from now on, treat her as your ○○—
2.11:
His voice faded like smoke in the wind, 
too faint to finish his final words. 
He slowly turned his head toward 
a shadowed corner of the room.
2.12:
That corner was shrouded in heavy shadows,
as if it concealed something of great importance.
2.13:
This man, who was both my father and my master,
took his last breath just like that.
His eyes remained open, 
but the light of life had already left them.
2.14:
Unconsciously, my eyes followed his gaze as well,
looking toward that mysterious corner—————
